attributes.action: IK Embassy to assist its citizens evacuation of the Middle East Conflict Zone
attributes.additional_details:
Provide on the ground assistance to those seeking to evacuate the area as individuals or as families.

The heightened risk should warrant UK Government assistance in each region.
attributes.background:
The UK GOVT should be supporting those British citizens who desire to flee the escalating conflict zone(s)
As other Nations have taken visible on the ground action to assist their citizens such as Ireland, Italy and Kazakhstan

rejection.details:
We cannot accept this petition as the Government has announced support for British citizens in the way that this petition calls for. 

More information is available here: https://www.gov.uk/government/news/foreign-secretary-statement-on-the-ongoing-situation-in-the-middle-east
